The Laws of Zambia
TANGANYIKA VICTORIA MEMORIAL INSTITUTE 42 of 1929
8 of 1934
15 of 1934
An Act to make further provision for the control and maintenance of the Victoria
Memorial Institute at Mbala.
[27th November, 1929]

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Tanganyika Victoria Memorial Institute Act. Short title
sections.text: This Act may be cited as the Tanganyika Victoria Memorial Institute Act. Short title

sections.heading: The building (hereinafter referred to as "the Institute") erected at Mbala by public Building to be known
sections.text:
The building (hereinafter referred to as "the Institute") erected at Mbala by public Building to be known
subscription to the memory of Her late Most Gracious Britannic Majesty Queen Victoria, as the Tanganyika
shall continue to be known as "The Tanganyika Victoria Memorial Institute" and may be Victoria Memorial
Institute
used as a Library, Museum, and Sports and Social Club.

sections.heading: The Institute together with the land being subdivision No. T56 in the Mbala Trustee of Institute
sections.text:
The Institute together with the land being subdivision No. T56 in the Mbala Trustee of Institute
Township in extent 0.4626864 of an hectre and on a portion of which said land the same and vesting of land
has been erected shall be vested in a trustee in trust for the people of the Mbala, Isoka and building
and Mporokoso Districts to be used for the purposes mentioned in section two. The
District Secretary for the time being of the Mbala District shall be such trustee and is
hereinafter referred to as "the trustee".
(As amended by Nos. 8 and 15 of 1934)

sections.heading: All movable property or articles of whatever nature now belonging to the Institute Articles and property
sections.text:
All movable property or articles of whatever nature now belonging to the Institute Articles and property
or now kept therein are hereby vested in the Committee of Management hereinafter of Institute vested in
mentioned. Committee

sections.heading: The subscribers to the fund for the erection of the Institute and all persons who Existing members
sections.text:
The subscribers to the fund for the erection of the Institute and all persons who Existing members
are members of the Institute at the commencement of this Act shall be deemed to be
members of the Institute as hereby constituted.

sections.heading: The general direction and management of the Institute shall be entrusted to a Committee of
sections.text:
The general direction and management of the Institute shall be entrusted to a Committee of
Committee of Management (hereinafter referred to as "the Committee") consisting of Management
seven members of whom one shall be the trustee or some person from time to time
nominated by him, and the remainder shall be elected by the members.

sections.heading: The members of the Committee, other than the trustee or the person from time Duration of office of
sections.text:
The members of the Committee, other than the trustee or the person from time Duration of office of
to time nominated by him, shall hold office for one year and shall be eligible for re-election Committee
by the members.

sections.heading: The first election of the members of the Committee shall take place on such day First election of
sections.text:
The first election of the members of the Committee shall take place on such day First election of
in April, 1930, in the Institute or at such other place at Mbala as the Committee may Committee
appoint and thereafter on such day in April of every year and at such place at Mbala as
the Committee may appoint.
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia

sections.heading: Until such election in the year 1930 as is mentioned in the last preceding section Appointment of
sections.text:
Until such election in the year 1930 as is mentioned in the last preceding section Appointment of
takes place, the Committee shall consist of the trustee and of such other persons not provisional Committee
exceeding six as the trustee may nominate.

sections.heading: The Committee shall elect one of their members as chairman who besides an Chairman of and
It shall be the duty of the Committee to maintain and keep the Institute in good Maintenance of
sections.text:
It shall be the duty of the Committee to maintain and keep the Institute in good Maintenance of
repair and condition out of the moneys received by them on behalf thereof and to insure Institute
and keep the building insured against damage by fire in such an amount and in such
insurance office as the trustee may approve. Within one month of the 31st March of every
year the Committee shall make such provision as the trustee may think necessary for the
maintenance and repair of the building during the ensuing year.
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia

sections.heading: In the event of the Institute being destroyed or damaged by fire, the Committee Damage by fire
sections.text:
In the event of the Institute being destroyed or damaged by fire, the Committee Damage by fire
shall apply all moneys received by them by virtue of any such insurance as is mentioned
in the last preceding section in rebuilding or reinstating the Institute.

sections.heading: All moneys received on behalf of the Institute shall be paid to the credit therof Bank account and
sections.text:
All moneys received on behalf of the Institute shall be paid to the credit therof Bank account and
into such bank as the Committee may from time to time appoint and it shall be lawful for investment of funds
the Committee to invest such part of such moneys as may not be required for immediate
use.

sections.heading: The accounts of the Institute shall be made up to the 31st March in each year Accounts
sections.text:
The accounts of the Institute shall be made up to the 31st March in each year Accounts
by the treasurer or secretary, as the case may be, and shall be duly audited by a
competent auditor.

sections.heading: Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained in any written law, the Exemption from rates
sections.text:
Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained in any written law, the Exemption from rates
Institute shall be exempted from the payment of all municipal rates and taxes.

sections.heading: In any legal proceedings instituted by or against the Institute it shall be lawful to Legal proceedings and
sections.text:
In any legal proceedings instituted by or against the Institute it shall be lawful to Legal proceedings and
do so by the style or description of "The Committee of the Tanganyika Victoria Memorial service of process
Institute" and the service of all legal process shall be effected on the secretary.
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
